calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
R. Thomas Griffith Esq. 510-275-4603 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Mr. Griffith states he is not contesting the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "(amended) motion to strike the renewal of judgment of defendant Josef P. Corbin and all subsequent filings" is granted.

Order is signed,

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgmnt
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Off Calendar
